scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none

rules: Import Fredoka and Nunito from Google Fonts or standard libraries.
Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Use rounded, friendly typography to match the brand.
Avoid muddy colors. Keep saturation high for accents.
Use pure white cards on off-white backgrounds for clarity.
Use colorful gradients sparingly, prefer solid vibrant blocks.

layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento-style grids for features and offerings to create a playful asymmetry.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for cards.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl or rounded-[2rem] for maximum playfulness.
rules: Avoid sharp edges completely. Everything should feel soft and tactile.
Break out of rigid bootstrap grids. Use overlapping elements.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Chunky padding (px-8 py-4 text-lg). Add a subtle drop shadow and -translate-y-1 on hover.
components.cards: White background, large border-radius (rounded-3xl), soft playful shadows (shadow-xl shadow-sky-500/10). Optional 2px borders in pastel colors.
components.inputs: Rounded-2xl, thick borders on focus (ring-4 ring-sky-300), large text, generous padding.
components.quote_calculator: Card-based stepper or grid selector. Use selectable image cards for age group and activities instead of standard radio buttons.
components.navigation: Sticky glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with a prominent CTA button.

motion.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105) and rotate slightly (rotate-1 or -rotate-1) for a bouncy, energetic feel.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade up with spring physics (Framer Motion).
motion.background: Use slow-moving, large CSS radial gradients in the background to simulate floating balloons or clouds.

marketing_site: Hero Section: Overlapping soft blobs, vibrant hero image, massive fun typography.
Age Groups: Bento grid of colorful cards with bouncy hover effects.
Activities & Offerings: Carousel or masonry grid.
Catering Packages: 3-column playful pricing table. Use 'SaaSFrame' inspired card layout but heavily styled with pastel borders and badges.
Snack Boxes: Large imagery, 2-column offset layout.
Dynamic Quote Calculator: Interactive multi-step form inside a prominent colored section (e.g., sky blue background).
Testimonials: Marquee of colorful feedback cards.
Footer: Massive brand text, Newsletter sign up, Social links.
admin_panel: Layout: Swiss/Soft UI hybrid for clarity, distinct from the marketing site to ensure productivity.
Features: Manage Packages, Edit Prices, View/Update Testimonials, Gallery Uploads, View Quote Requests.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use lucide-react for standard icons, but wrap them in colorful circular backgrounds (e.g., bg-amber-100 text-amber-500 p-3 rounded-full).
Ensure the quote calculator feels like a fun quiz. Avoid boring standard radio buttons; use visual card selectors.
Use heavily rounded corners (rounded-3xl or rounded-full) on all interactive elements to maintain the 'Vibrant Play' archetype.
Add data-testid attributes to all form inputs, buttons, and calculable outputs (e.g., data-testid='quote-calculator-total').
Create moving background textures using pure CSS radial gradients (e.g., massive pastel blue and yellow blurs positioned absolute behind hero).
Do NOT use placeholder images. Rely ENTIRELY on the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for creative marketing layouts, and Shadcn (heavily customized) for the Admin panel and Quote Calculator logic.
